tagline: Powering Nigeria's Energy Future with Reliable Petroleum Solutions

sections.name: Hero
sections.copy:
Akasa Petroleum Logistics Limited

Your Trusted Partner in Crude Oil Marketing and Bunkering Services

With strategic operations across Nigeria, we deliver comprehensive petroleum logistics solutions that keep your business moving. From crude oil marketing to marine bunkering services, Akasa ensures reliable supply chains and seamless energy distribution.

Contact Us Today
sections.imagePrompt: Photorealistic aerial view of a modern Nigerian petroleum logistics facility at golden hour, showing clean fuel storage tanks, professional pipeline infrastructure, and delivery trucks in organized formation, with the Nigerian landscape visible in the background, conveying scale, professionalism, and energy sector excellence

sections.name: About Us
sections.copy:
About Akasa Petroleum Logistics Limited

Akasa Petroleum Logistics Limited (also trading as Akasa Bunkering Services Co) is a leading Nigerian oil and gas company specializing in crude oil marketing and comprehensive bunkering services. Based in Alimosho, Lagos, we serve clients across Nigeria's energy sector with professionalism, reliability, and industry expertise.

Our founder, a seasoned crude oil marketer, established Akasa with a vision to bridge critical gaps in Nigeria's petroleum supply chain. We understand the complexities of the Nigerian energy market and deliver tailored solutions that meet the demanding requirements of our clients.

At Akasa, we combine deep industry knowledge with operational excellence to ensure uninterrupted petroleum supply, competitive pricing, and regulatory compliance. Whether you require crude oil procurement, marine fuel supply, or logistics coordination, our team delivers results you can depend on.
sections.imagePrompt: Professional photograph of a Nigerian oil and gas operations control room with monitoring screens showing pipeline networks and logistics data, experienced Nigerian professionals in corporate attire reviewing operations, modern office setting with subtle petroleum industry branding, conveying expertise and reliability

sections.name: Our Services
sections.copy:
Comprehensive Petroleum Solutions

Crude Oil Marketing
We connect producers with refineries and buyers across Nigeria, facilitating transparent transactions and efficient crude oil distribution. Our market intelligence and extensive network ensure competitive rates and reliable supply chains for all stakeholders.

Marine Bunkering Services
Akasa Bunkering Services Co provides professional marine fuel supply to vessels operating in Nigerian waters. We deliver high-quality marine fuel products with precise scheduling, ensuring your fleet maintains optimal operations without delays.

Petroleum Logistics & Distribution
Our end-to-end logistics solutions cover transportation, storage coordination, and supply chain management for petroleum products. We ensure safe, timely delivery while maintaining strict quality and safety standards.

Supply Chain Consultation
Leverage our expertise to optimize your petroleum procurement and distribution strategies. We provide market analysis, regulatory guidance, and operational recommendations tailored to Nigeria's oil and gas landscape.
sections.imagePrompt: Split-screen composition showing Nigerian petroleum operations: left side features a fuel tanker truck being loaded at a modern depot with safety protocols visible, right side shows a bunkering operation at Lagos port with a vessel receiving marine fuel, both scenes in bright daylight emphasizing professionalism and safety standards

sections.name: Why Choose Akasa
sections.copy:
Why Choose Akasa Petroleum Logistics

Industry Expertise
Our leadership brings years of hands-on experience in crude oil marketing and Nigeria's petroleum sector, ensuring informed decision-making and strategic operations.

Reliable Supply Chain
We maintain strong relationships with suppliers, transporters, and regulatory bodies, guaranteeing consistent product availability and timely delivery.

Competitive Pricing
Our market position and operational efficiency enable us to offer competitive rates without compromising on quality or service standards.

Regulatory Compliance
Akasa operates in full compliance with Nigerian petroleum regulations, maintaining all required licenses and industry certifications for your peace of mind.

Customer-Centric Approach
We tailor our services to your specific requirements, providing flexible solutions and responsive support that adapts to your business needs.

sections.name: Contact Us
sections.copy:
Get in Touch with Akasa Petroleum Logistics

Ready to discuss your petroleum logistics requirements? Our team is available to provide detailed consultations and customized solutions for your business.

Akasa Petroleum Logistics Limited

Partner with Akasa today and experience petroleum logistics excellence.
